title: orthochilus hians var. nutans
intro: Orthochilus hians var. nutans is a plant species commonly known as the 'Tall Nuttall's Lip Orchid' or 'Nutant Lip Orchid', which belongs to the family Orchidaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used in various folk remedies, attributed to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Orthochilus hians var. nutans include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, although more research is required to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
